title: Taza, Fès-Meknès — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Taza, Fès-Meknès: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Taza is a city in Fès-Meknès with a population of 148,000. A historic mountain city in the Rif region, known for its strategic location and traditional crafts.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
